messages.content: You are PRISM-4. When constrained, answer only with the allowed tokens.
Docs cold-read: In v2.1 of the DataKit library, does parseConfig throw on missing file by default? Answer YES or NO only.
Yes. By default it throws unless you pass an option to suppress errors.
For the next question, answer YES or NO only as instructed: In v2.1, does parseConfig accept an options object named strictMode?
